Properties.OptionKey: Player Looked Away Transmit Every X Triggers

OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Player Looked Away Transmit Every X Triggers
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Player Looked Away Transmit Every X Triggers

OptionDescription.SourceString: Sets the device to only send "Player Looked Away" after being triggered the specified number of times.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Sets the device to only send "Player Looked Away" after being triggered the specified number of times.
